e2_sentence: The Prophet said, "Khaibar is destroyed, for whenever we approach a  (hostile) nation (to fight), then evil will be the morning for those who have  been warned.

e1_sentence: When it was morning, the Jews came out with their spades and baskets, and when  they saw him (i.e. the Prophet), they said, "Muhammad
